Title: Niemann, Georg
Overview: Architect and archaeologist. Professor at University of Vienna 1873-?. Particularly known for his artistic reconstruction of ancient buildings based on his architectural training, artiistic ability and archaeological expertise.
Sources: Archäologenbildnisse: Porträts und Kurzbiographien von Klassichen Archäologen deutscher Sprache. Reinhard Lullies, ed. Mainz am Rhein: Verlag Philipp von Zabern, 1988: 80.
